The '''Zuraco Cargo Hauler''' was a medium transport built by [[Zuraco]].

==Characteristics==
A lesser known medium freighter, the Zuraco relied on its tough hull and superior sensor package to protect it from threats. New Zuraco's were not equipped with any armament.

==Known Ships==
*''[[Atron's Mistress]]''
